nasb.text: Hezekiah gave him all the silver which was found in the house of the Lord, and in the treasuries of the king’s house.

esv.text: And Hezekiah gave him all the silver that was found in the house of the Lord and in the treasuries of the king’s house.

cnv.text: 希西家就把耶和華殿和王宮寶庫內找到的所有金子都給了他。

ccb.text: 希西迦将耶和华殿里和王宫库房里的所有银子都给了他，
